statement: He who suffers before it is necessary, suffers more than is necessary.
author: Seneca
primary_source: Moral Letters to Lucilius, Letter 98 (paraphrase of core teaching; canonical form in Ep. 98.8)
verified_via: Seneca Ep. 98; Latin 'Qui ante necessarium dolet, plus quam necesse est dolet' — PD editions
